Interface IConfigParser

All Known Implementing Classes:
ConditionMacroParser, InstructionParser, SettingsParser
public interface IConfigParser
Parser interface for processing XML-based configuration documents.

Provides methods to parse a Document and notify registered listeners about each parsed element.

Implementations can extend this interface and override parseConfig(Document) to provide the specific parsing logic.

The listener list is thread-safe, using CopyOnWriteArrayList

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ

    Fields

    Description
    static final List<IConfigEventListener>
    LISTENERS
    Thread-safe list of listeners to notify when elements are parsed

    fireEvent(Element xmlElement, Object result)
    Fires a ParsingEvent to all registered listeners.

    Parses a given XML document and fires events for each element that is successfully parsed.

  • Field Details

    • LISTENERS

      static final List<IConfigEventListener> LISTENERS
      Thread-safe list of listeners to notify when elements are parsed

  • Method Details

    • parseConfig

      void parseConfig(Document xmlDocument)
      Parses a given XML document and fires events for each element that is successfully parsed.
      Parameters:
      xmlDocument - the XML configuration document to parse

    • addListener

      default void addListener(IConfigEventListener listener)
      Registers a new listener to receive parsing events.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to add

    • fireEvent

      default void fireEvent(Element xmlElement, Object result)
      Fires a ParsingEvent to all registered listeners.
      Parameters:
      xmlElement - the XML element that was parsed
      result - the result of parsing the element
